Cell.Data: The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
{STR_leaderName} has committed atrocities against the local population!
{STR_leaderName} dopuszcza się okrucieństw na miejscowej populacji!

All entries with TITLE in the TEXT ID column are the title in the game for that casus belli. These entries are used in lists, etc. to show the actions of players and the consequences of these actions.
This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is plotting to take over the planet!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} has started constructing a Doomsday Weapon!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is depleting the planet’s natural resources!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is heavily polluting the planet with toxic emissions!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is hollowing out the planet with huge excavations!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is employing frontier policies that infringe on our borders!
{STR_leaderName} realizuje strategie pograniczne, które naruszają nasze granice!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is employing aggressive military stratagies near our lands!
{STR_leaderName} prowadzi agresywne manewry wojskowe niedaleko naszych ziem!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is seeking to destroy races that do not adhere to Star Union doctrine!
{STR_leaderName} chce zniszczyć cywilizacje, które nie przestrzegają doktryny Związku Gwiezdnego!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is building ghastly hive-like structures that horrify our people!
{STR_leaderName} tworzy upiorne ulopodobne konstrukcje, które przerażają naszą ludność!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is using psionic powers to control humanoid life!
{STR_leaderName} korzysta z mocy psionicznych do kontroli humanoidalnych form życia!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is seeking the destruction of the remnants of the Star Union!
{STR_leaderName} dąży do zniszczenia pozostałości Związku Gwiezdnego!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is using subterfuge to undermine our colony for their own goals!
{STR_leaderName} próbuje podstępem osłabić naszą kolonię dla własnych korzyści!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} plans to monopolize the planet’s economy through the control of trade!
{STR_leaderName} planuje zdominować gospodarkę planety poprzez kontrolę handlu!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is using duplicity to destroy our relations with other colonies!
{STR_leaderName} podstępnie próbuje zniszczyć nasze relacje z innymi koloniami!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is recycling body parts taken from our fallen brothers and sisters!
{STR_leaderName} wykorzystuje części ciał naszych poległych braci i sióstr!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is splicing the DNA of kidnapped citizens!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is trying to disfigure our people into cybernetic abominations!
{STR_leaderName} próbuje przerobić naszą ludność na cybernetyczne szkaradztwa!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is mutilating the genetic code of indigenous life!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is deploying guerilla tactics to ambush local convoys!
{STR_leaderName}, prowadząc akcje partyzanckie, napada na lokalne konwoje!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is terraforming the planet for their own ends!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is actively working to make sure the Star Union is not revived!
{STR_leaderName} dokłada starań, by Związek Gwiezdny nie został przywrócony!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is blocking Vanguard expeditions and throttling future explorations!
{STR_leaderName} blokuje ekspedycje Awangardy i tłumi w zarodku przyszłe wyprawy!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} was involved in the collapse of the Star Union!
{STR_leaderName} ma swój udział w rozpadzie Związku Gwiezdnego!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is disregarding the planet’s ecosystem and continues their harmful environmental policies!
{STR_leaderName} lekceważy ekosystem planety i kontynuuje szkodliwą dla środowiska działalność!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is actively hunting vital indigenous species!
{STR_leaderName} poluje na kluczowe dla ekosystemu miejscowe gatunki!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is blocking full planetary terraforming protocols, denying the evolution of our race!
{STR_leaderName} blokuje protokoły terraformacyjne planety, co uniemożliwia rozwój naszej cywilizacji!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is blocking vital resource deposits that can be used for our production!
{STR_leaderName} blokuje dostęp do ważnych zasobów, których potrzebujemy w naszej produkcji!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is applying trade embargos against our fossil fuel commodities!
{STR_leaderName} nakłada embargo na nasze paliwa kopalne!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is terraforming the planet causing the destruction of resources needed by our race!
{STR_leaderName} terraformuje planetę, niszcząc zasoby, jakich potrzebuje nasza cywilizacja!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} lobotomized our hive queens during the days of the Empire!
{STR_leaderName} ma na sumieniu poddanie naszych królowych roju lobotomii w czasach świetności imperium!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} has gone unpunished for their millennium-long enslavement by humanoids!
{STR_leaderName} musi ponieść karę za tysiąclecie niewolnictwa!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is outlawing the use of bionics!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} does not recognize the Assembly as a sovereign people!
{STR_leaderName} nie uznaje Zgromadzenia za suwerenny naród!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is persecuting citizens with augmented bodies!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is blocking our trade routes between colonies!
{STR_leaderName} blokuje nasze szlaki handlowe między koloniami!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is using espionage in our diplomatic councils!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is implementing severe and unjust economic sanctions!
{STR_leaderName} nakłada surowe i niesprawiedliwe sankcje ekonomiczne!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is evil and should be eradicated.
{STR_leaderName} jest wcieleniem zła i nie może dalej istnieć.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} has started development of an apocalyptic weapon!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} has increased development for an apocalyptic weapon!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} will soon complete development of an apocalyptic weapon!
{STR_leaderName} wkrótce zakończy prace nad bronią apokalipsy!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is paving the way to planetary domination!
{STR_leaderName} przygotowuje swoją drogą do dominacji planetarnej!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} zbliża się do osiągnięcia dominacji planetarnej!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} will soon have domination over this planet!
{STR_leaderName} jest o krok od osiągnięcia dominacji planetarnej!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is trying to control us through the Planetary Unifier Protocol!
{STR_leaderName} próbuje przejąć nad nami kontrolę za pomocą protokołu zjednoczenia planetarnego!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} will have full control over us through the Planetary Unifier Protocol!
{STR_leaderName} uzyska nad nami pełną kontrolę za pomocą protokołu zjednoczenia planetarnego!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} became an enemy through a call to war.
{STR_leaderName} wskutek wezwania do wojny jest naszym wrogiem.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is reportedly not to be trusted due to their past actions.
{STR_leaderName} ponoć nie jest godzien zaufania ze względu na popełnione czyny.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is rumored to have commited serious attrocities.
{STR_leaderName} podobno ma na sumieniu szczególne okrucieństwa.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} is commiting crimes against other commanders and threatens our empire.
{STR_leaderName} popełnia zbrodnie przeciwko innym dowódcom i zagraża naszemu imperium.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} shares a distrusted race relation with us.
{STR_leaderName} ma z nami stosunki: brak zaufania.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} shares a disliked race relation with us.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_leaderName} shares a despised race relation with us.
{STR_leaderName} ma z nami relacje: pogardzana cywilizacja.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
